From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

[![logo](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/99/Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg/40px-Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg)

Look up ***[Sverige](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/Sverige "wiktionary:Sverige")*** in Wiktionary, the free dictionary.

**Sverige** is the Swedish-language name for [Sweden](/wiki/Sweden "Sweden").

**Sverige** may also refer to:

* [HSwMS *Sverige*](/wiki/HSwMS_Sverige "HSwMS Sverige"), a Swedish coastal defence ship used by the Swedish Navy, 1915–1953
* [*Sverige*](/wiki/Sverige_(yacht) "Sverige (yacht)"), a 12 Metre-class yacht
* [*Sverige*-class coastal defence ship](/wiki/Sverige-class_coastal_defence_ship "Sverige-class coastal defence ship"), a class of ships in the Swedish Navy
* "Sverige", a song by Basshunter from *[LOL <(^^,)>](/wiki/LOL_(Basshunter_album) "LOL (Basshunter album)")*
* "Sverige", a song by Kent from *[Vapen & ammunition](/wiki/Vapen_%26_ammunition "Vapen & ammunition")*
* "Sverige", a hymn with lyrics by Verner von Heidenstam; see "[Du gamla, du fria](/wiki/Du_gamla,_du_fria "Du gamla, du fria")"
* "Sverige (Jag Är Insnöad På Östfronten)", a song by The Stranglers, non-album single from *[Black and White](/wiki/Black_and_White_(The_Stranglers_album) "Black and White (The Stranglers album)")*
